headline: CDT May 2026 - 1999 Called, They Want Their Stock Market Back
summary: The pre-2026 AI phenom was sparked by the introduction of ChatGPT. The post-May 2026 era is different. We may also be simultaneously mimicking the Pets.com phase with the SpaceX IPO.
